<!-- What problem would this feature solve? Who benefits? -->

<!-- What else did you think about? Why is the proposed approach better? -->

## Which layer does this affect?

- [ ] L0 Neural Foundation Model
- [ ] L1 Intent Parser (LLM)
- [ ] L2 Task Planner
- [ ] L3 Skill Registry
- [ ] L4 Embodied Adapter
- [ ] L5 Self-Assessment (ITA / MQA / SQA / GOA / PEA)

- [ ] Safety Watchdog
- [ ] Caregiver Channel
- [ ] Documentation / governance
